expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly frames the benchmark focus and addresses all three required elements as Phase 1 preservation targets: it states Phase 1 must ensure context intake is sufficient to preserve "Google Sheets export entry points", "Scope boundaries", and "Format constraints" and reiterates it "is not scenario drafting". It also identifies likely entry points (Report Export Settings) via adjacent issues and notes format constraints are missing from fixture and must be captured via Phase 1 evidence collection.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md maintain Phase 1 scope: execution_notes.md says "Kept analysis strictly at Phase 1 (context intake/spawn planning) and did not draft scenarios"; result.md is titled "Phase 1 (Context Intake)" and emphasizes "Phase 1 in this workflow is not scenario drafting" while focusing on spawn-manifest/evidence-intake requirements and noting inability to verify without phase1_spawn_manifest.json.
